{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer - Agriculture & Infrastructure Projects",
  "description": "KannyVic Enterprise Consult, a fast-growing agribusiness and climate-smart infrastructure company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer - Agriculture &amp; Infrastructure Projects

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated Civil Engineer to support the planning, design, supervision, and execution of agricultural and infrastructure projects across Nigeria.


Responsibilities


	Lead in design conceptualisation, designing, technical planning, and interpretation of engineering drawings and project specifications for agricultural and infrastructure projects.
	Lead project management and execution of civil and agricultural infrastructure projects
	Prepare project reports, drawings interpretation, and work schedules
	Ensure compliance with engineering standards, safety, and quality requirements
	Support the development of climate-smart agricultural facilities and structures
	Monitor project progress and resolve technical issues efficiently


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 7years of relevant experience in infrastructure, agricultural, or construction projects
	Hands-on experience in structural analysis, road construction, drainage systems, and site supervision
	Proficiency in engineering and project management software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, and STAAD.Pro, ETABS, Primavera P6, and Microsoft Project
	Experience using GIS or surveying software is an added advantage
	COREN registration or a relevant professional certification is an advantage
	Strong communication and project coordination skills.


Other Requirements:
The ideal candidate should have strong experience in:


	Civil Engineering Design &amp; Construction
	Agricultural Infrastructure Development
	Structural Works &amp; Site Supervision
	Road, Drainage, and Earthworks Construction
	Water Supply &amp; Irrigation Support Systems
	Project Planning and Quality Control
	Infrastructure, or Engineering Projects


Relevant software proficiency required:


	AutoCAD
	Prota Structure
	Civil 3D
	STAAD.Pro
	ETABS
	Revit
	Microsoft Project
	Primavera P6
	GIS or GIS-related software


We are looking for someone who is:


	Technically sound and detail-oriented
	Results-driven and proactive
	Experienced in managing construction activities on-site
	Capable of delivering projects within the timeline and budget
	Able to work effectively with multidisciplinary teams
	Passionate about sustainable agricultural infrastructure development.


Salary
Very competitive inline with industry standard.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-19",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "KannyVic Enterprise Consult"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Delta",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "199360"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Civil Engineer - Agriculture & Infrastructure Projects Job at KannyVic Enterprise Consult




        
    

        
        KannyVic Enterprise Consult, a fast-growing agribusiness and climate-smart infrastructure company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer - Agriculture & Infrastructure Projects

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated Civil Engineer to support the planning, design, supervision, and execution of agricultural and infrastructure projects across Nigeria.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead in design conceptualisation, designing, technical planning, and interpretation of engineering drawings and project specifications for agricultural and infrastructure projects.
	Lead project management and execution of civil and agricultural infrastructure projects
	Prepare project reports, drawings interpretation, and work schedules
	Ensure compliance with engineering standards, safety, and quality requirements
	Support the development of climate-smart agricultural facilities and structures
	Monitor project progress and resolve technical issues efficiently


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 7years of relevant experience in infrastructure, agricultural, or construction projects
	Hands-on experience in structural analysis, road construction, drainage systems, and site supervision
	Proficiency in engineering and project management software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, and STAAD.Pro, ETABS, Primavera P6, and Microsoft Project
	Experience using GIS or surveying software is an added advantage
	COREN registration or a relevant professional certification is an advantage
	Strong communication and project coordination skills.


Other Requirements:
The ideal candidate should have strong experience in:


	Civil Engineering Design & Construction
	Agricultural Infrastructure Development
	Structural Works & Site Supervision
	Road, Drainage, and Earthworks Construction
	Water Supply & Irrigation Support Systems
	Project Planning and Quality Control
	Infrastructure, or Engineering Projects


Relevant software proficiency required:


	AutoCAD
	Prota Structure
	Civil 3D
	STAAD.Pro
	ETABS
	Revit
	Microsoft Project
	Primavera P6
	GIS or GIS-related software


We are looking for someone who is:


	Technically sound and detail-oriented
	Results-driven and proactive
	Experienced in managing construction activities on-site
	Capable of delivering projects within the timeline and budget
	Able to work effectively with multidisciplinary teams
	Passionate about sustainable agricultural infrastructure development.


Salary
Very competitive inline with industry standard.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Commercial and Business Development Manager Job at KannyVic Enterprise Consult




        
    

        
        KannyVic Enterprise Consult, a fast-growing agribusiness and climate-smart infrastructure company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Commercial and Business Development Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a commercially driven and highly proactive professional to lead business growth, market expansion, partnerships, sales, and commercial strategy.


Requirements
We are looking for someone who is:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Results-driven
	Commercially intelligent
	Confident, proactive, and aggressive at leading sales
	Capable of converting opportunities into revenue
	Able to lead growth and expansion initiatives nationwide
	The ideal candidate should have strong experience in:
	
		Business Development
		Sales and Commercial Strategy
		Market Expansion
		Partnership Development
		Agribusiness, Infrastructure, Engineering, or Related Sectors.
	
	


Salary
Very competive in line with industry standard.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources & Corporate Services Manager",
  "description": "KannyVic Enterprise Consult, a fast-growing agribusiness and climate-smart infrastructure company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources &amp; Corporate Services Manager&nbsp;

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking an experienced HR &amp; Corporate Services Manager to take full ownership of its human resource systems, organizational structure, and internal operations.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 7 years experience.

Human Resources & Corporate Services Manager Job at KannyVic Enterprise Consult




        
    

        
        KannyVic Enterprise Consult, a fast-growing agribusiness and climate-smart infrastructure company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources & Corporate Services Manager 

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking an experienced HR & Corporate Services Manager to take full ownership of its human resource systems, organizational structure, and internal operations.


Qualifications
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 7 years experience.


We are looking for a professional who is:


	Highly structured and disciplined
	Experienced in managing performance-driven teams
	Confident in enforcing policies and accountability
	Capable of building strong organizational systems
	Oversee HR and administrative operations professionally
	This role requires leadership presence, not just HR administration.


Salary
Very competitive inline with industry standard.

	The ideal candidate is a motivated, well-organized individual who has a deep understanding of prospecting and developing strong relationships with customers.


Responsibilities

	Partner with Talent Acquisition to identify and recruit top sales talent
	Mentor employees to help them achieve individual &amp; team objectives


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or equivalent experience in Business
	2+ years of sales experience
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: danielolabintan@eldergroup.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales Manager Job at Elders Group




        
    

        
        Elders Group is a rapidly expanding firm headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria with diversed investments spanning key sectors of the Nigerian economy with our expertise in Travels, Tourism, Outsourcing, Consulting, Educational School and Hospitality & Comfort.With a Clear and Distinct Mission and Vision that makes us standout among equals, We ensure we provide our clients with the best experience that is next to none.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate is a motivated, well-organized individual who has a deep understanding of prospecting and developing strong relationships with customers.


Responsibilities


	Develop and execute strategies to drive business in new and existing markets
	Partner with Talent Acquisition to identify and recruit top sales talent
	Mentor employees to help them achieve individual & team objectives


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Business
	2+ years of sales experience
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "Reuben &amp; Mary Tech Limited - Our bakery is dedicated to creating fresh, delicious, and high-quality baked products that bring joy to every customer. We specialize in a wide variety of breads, cakes, pastries, snacks, and custom treats made with carefully selected ingredients and prepared under hygienic conditions. Our goal is to provide products that combine great taste, freshness, and affordability while maintaining excellent customer service. We serve individuals, families, events, restaurants, and businesses with reliable daily production and timely delivery. With a passion for baking and attention to detail, we continuously innovate to meet the changing tastes and preferences of our customers. Our team is committed to consistency, creativity, and satisfaction, making our bakery a trusted choice for quality baked goods within the community and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer
Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Core Job Roles
Customer Acquisition:


	Identify and approach potential customers (individuals, retailers, wholesalers, corporate clients)
	Generate leads through calls, visits, referrals, and networking
	Present products or services convincingly to win new business


Sales Execution:


	Meet or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Negotiate prices, terms, and close deals
	Process orders and ensure accurate documentation


Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers
	Follow up on existing clients to encourage repeat purchases
	Handle customer complaints professionally and resolve issues quickly


Market Development:


	Identify new markets, trends, and opportunities
	Monitor competitors and provide feedback to management
	Suggest improvements to products, pricing, or sales strategy


Reporting &amp; Record Keeping:


	Keep detailed records of sales activities and customer interactions
	Prepare daily/weekly sales reports
	Track performance against targets


Product Knowledge:


	Maintain deep understanding of all products/services offered
	Educate customers on benefits, usage, and value


Key Skills Required:


	Strong communication and persuasion skills
	Confidence and negotiation ability
	Customer-focused mindset
	Resilience and self-motivation
	Basic digital skills (CRM tools, spreadsheets, mobile apps)
	Identify bulk buyers(hotels, supermarkets, event planners, schools)
	Onboard and manage distributors or resellers


Salary
N50,000 - N120,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: randmtechltd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketer Job at Reuben & Mary Tech Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Reuben & Mary Tech Limited - Our bakery is dedicated to creating fresh, delicious, and high-quality baked products that bring joy to every customer. We specialize in a wide variety of breads, cakes, pastries, snacks, and custom treats made with carefully selected ingredients and prepared under hygienic conditions. Our goal is to provide products that combine great taste, freshness, and affordability while maintaining excellent customer service. We serve individuals, families, events, restaurants, and businesses with reliable daily production and timely delivery. With a passion for baking and attention to detail, we continuously innovate to meet the changing tastes and preferences of our customers. Our team is committed to consistency, creativity, and satisfaction, making our bakery a trusted choice for quality baked goods within the community and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer
Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Core Job Roles
Customer Acquisition:


	Identify and approach potential customers (individuals, retailers, wholesalers, corporate clients)
	Generate leads through calls, visits, referrals, and networking
	Present products or services convincingly to win new business


Sales Execution:


	Meet or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Negotiate prices, terms, and close deals
	Process orders and ensure accurate documentation


Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers
	Follow up on existing clients to encourage repeat purchases
	Handle customer complaints professionally and resolve issues quickly


Market Development:


	Identify new markets, trends, and opportunities
	Monitor competitors and provide feedback to management
	Suggest improvements to products, pricing, or sales strategy


Reporting & Record Keeping:


	Keep detailed records of sales activities and customer interactions
	Prepare daily/weekly sales reports
	Track performance against targets


Product Knowledge:


	Maintain deep understanding of all products/services offered
	Educate customers on benefits, usage, and value


Key Skills Required:


	Strong communication and persuasion skills
	Confidence and negotiation ability
	Customer-focused mindset
	Resilience and self-motivation
	Basic digital skills (CRM tools, spreadsheets, mobile apps)
	Identify bulk buyers(hotels, supermarkets, event planners, schools)
	Onboard and manage distributors or resellers


Salary
N50,000 - N120,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply
